# PERF-89 positive: Echo middleware allocates per request
lang: go
file: PERF-089-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"github.com/labstack/echo/v4"
)

type Config struct {
	Token string `json:"token"`
}

func ConfigMiddleware(next echo.HandlerFunc) echo.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c echo.Context) error {
		var cfg Config
		raw := []byte(`{"token":"abc"}`)
		if err := json.Unmarshal(raw, &cfg); err != nil {
			return next(c)
		}
		c.Set("token", cfg.Token)
		return next(c)
	}
}
